channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: binhnguyennus/awesome-scalability
item.description: The Patterns of Scalable, Reliable, and Performant Large-Scale Systems

item.title: programthink/books
item.description: 【编程随想】收藏的电子书清单（多个学科，含下载链接）

item.title: csseky/cskaoyan
item.description: 提供计算机考研和软件工程考研专业的各个学校 考研真题

item.title: freefq/free
item.description: 翻墙、免费翻墙、免费科学上网、免费节点、免费梯子、免费ss/ssr/v2ray/trojan节点、蓝灯、谷歌商店、翻墙梯子

item.title: maziarraissi/Applied-Deep-Learning
item.description: Applied Deep Learning

item.title: lydiahallie/javascript-questions
item.description: A long list of (advanced) JavaScript questions, and their explanations ✨

item.title: JetBrains/kotlin
item.description: The Kotlin Programming Language.

item.title: jwasham/coding-interview-university
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: dastergon/awesome-sre
item.description: A curated list of Site Reliability and Production Engineering resources.

item.title: yanue/V2rayU
item.description: V2rayU,基于v2ray核心的mac版客户端,用于科学上网,使用swift编写,支持vmess,shadowsocks,socks5等服务协议,支持订阅, 支持二维码,剪贴板导入,手动配置,二维码分享等

item.title: keithnull/TeachYourselfCS-CN
item.description: TeachYourselfCS 的中文翻译 | A Chinese translation of TeachYourselfCS

item.title: AllThingsSmitty/css-protips
item.description: A collection of tips to help take your CSS skills pro

item.title: ClashDotNetFramework/ClashDotNetFramework
item.description: A .NET 5 based Clash GUI Proxy For Windows

item.title: chromium/chromium
item.description: The official GitHub mirror of the Chromium source

item.title: ossu/computer-science
item.description: 🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!

item.title: rd2coding/Road2Coding
item.description: 编程之路

item.title: imarvinle/awesome-cs-books
item.description: 经典编程书籍大全，涵盖：计算机系统与网络、系统架构、算法与数据结构、前端开发、后端开发、移动开发、数据库、测试、项目与团队、程序员职业修炼、求职面试等

item.title: jakejarvis/awesome-shodan-queries
item.description: 🔍 A collection of interesting, funny, and depressing search queries to plug into https://shodan.io/ 👩‍💻

item.title: rockerBOO/awesome-neovim
item.description: Collections of awesome neovim plugins.

item.title: florinpop17/app-ideas
item.description: A Collection of application ideas which can be used to improve your coding skills.

item.title: akullpp/awesome-java
item.description: A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries and software for the Java programming language.

item.title: Ebazhanov/linkedin-skill-assessments-quizzes
item.description: Full reference of LinkedIn answers 2021 for skill assessments, LinkedIn test, questions and answers (aws-lambda, rest-api, javascript, react, git, html, jquery, mongodb, java, css, python, machine-learning, power-point) linkedin excel test lösungen, linkedin machine learning test

item.title: shashank88/system_design
item.description: Preparation links and resources for system design questions
